moduleDescription:
Implementation of:
  • singly linked lists
  • doubly linked lists
  • singly linked rings (circular lists)
  • doubly linked rings (circular lists)

Basic Usage

Because it makes no sense to do otherwise, the next and prev pointers are not hidden from you and can be manipulated directly for efficiency.

Lists

Rings

See also

  • deques module for double-ended queues

entries.name: DoublyLinkedNodeObj
entries.code:
DoublyLinkedNodeObj[T] = object
  next*: DoublyLinkedNode[T]
  prev* {.cursor.}: DoublyLinkedNode[T]
  value*: T
entries.description:
A node of a doubly linked list.

It consists of a value field, and pointers to next and prev.

entries.name: DoublyLinkedNode
entries.code: DoublyLinkedNode[T] = ref DoublyLinkedNodeObj[T]

entries.name: SinglyLinkedNodeObj
entries.code:
SinglyLinkedNodeObj[T] = object
  next*: SinglyLinkedNode[T]
  value*: T
entries.description:
A node of a singly linked list.

It consists of a value field, and a pointer to next.

entries.name: SinglyLinkedNode
entries.code: SinglyLinkedNode[T] = ref SinglyLinkedNodeObj[T]

entries.name: SinglyLinkedList
entries.code:
SinglyLinkedList[T] = object
  head*: SinglyLinkedNode[T]
  tail* {.cursor.}: SinglyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: A singly linked list.

entries.name: DoublyLinkedList
entries.code:
DoublyLinkedList[T] = object
  head*: DoublyLinkedNode[T]
  tail* {.cursor.}: DoublyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: A doubly linked list.

entries.name: SinglyLinkedRing
entries.code:
SinglyLinkedRing[T] = object
  head*: SinglyLinkedNode[T]
  tail* {.cursor.}: SinglyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: A singly linked ring.

entries.name: DoublyLinkedRing
entries.code:
DoublyLinkedRing[T] = object
  head*: DoublyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: A doubly linked ring.

entries.name: SomeLinkedList
entries.code: SomeLinkedList[T] = SinglyLinkedList[T] | DoublyLinkedList[T]

entries.name: SomeLinkedRing
entries.code: SomeLinkedRing[T] = SinglyLinkedRing[T] | DoublyLinkedRing[T]

entries.name: SomeLinkedCollection
entries.code: SomeLinkedCollection[T] = SomeLinkedList[T] | SomeLinkedRing[T]

entries.name: SomeLinkedNode
entries.code: SomeLinkedNode[T] = SinglyLinkedNode[T] | DoublyLinkedNode[T]

entries.name: initSinglyLinkedList
entries.code: proc initSinglyLinkedList[T](): SinglyLinkedList[T]
entries.description:
Creates a new singly linked list that is empty.

Singly linked lists are initialized by default, so it is not necessary to call this function explicitly.

entries.name: initDoublyLinkedList
entries.code: proc initDoublyLinkedList[T](): DoublyLinkedList[T]
entries.description:
Creates a new doubly linked list that is empty.

Doubly linked lists are initialized by default, so it is not necessary to call this function explicitly.

entries.name: initSinglyLinkedRing
entries.code: proc initSinglyLinkedRing[T](): SinglyLinkedRing[T]
entries.description:
Creates a new singly linked ring that is empty.

Singly linked rings are initialized by default, so it is not necessary to call this function explicitly.

entries.name: initDoublyLinkedRing
entries.code: proc initDoublyLinkedRing[T](): DoublyLinkedRing[T]
entries.description:
Creates a new doubly linked ring that is empty.

Doubly linked rings are initialized by default, so it is not necessary to call this function explicitly.

entries.name: newDoublyLinkedNode
entries.code: proc newDoublyLinkedNode[T](value: T): DoublyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: Creates a new doubly linked node with the given value.

entries.name: newSinglyLinkedNode
entries.code: proc newSinglyLinkedNode[T](value: T): SinglyLinkedNode[T]
entries.description: Creates a new singly linked node with the given value.

entries.name: items
entries.code: iterator items[T](L: SomeLinkedList[T]): T
entries.description:
Yields every value of L.

See also:

  • mitems iterator
  • nodes iterator

entries.name: items
entries.code: iterator items[T](L: SomeLinkedRing[T]): T
entries.description:
Yields every value of L.

See also:

  • mitems iterator
  • nodes iterator

entries.name: mitems
entries.code: iterator mitems[T](L: var SomeLinkedList[T]): var T
entries.description:
Yields every value of L so that you can modify it.

See also:

  • items iterator
  • nodes iterator

entries.name: mitems
entries.code: iterator mitems[T](L: var SomeLinkedRing[T]): var T
entries.description:
Yields every value of L so that you can modify it.

See also:

  • items iterator
  • nodes iterator

entries.name: nodes
entries.code: iterator nodes[T](L: SomeLinkedList[T]): SomeLinkedNode[T]
entries.description:
Iterates over every node of x. Removing the current node from the list during traversal is supported.

See also:

  • items iterator
  • mitems iterator

entries.name: nodes
entries.code: iterator nodes[T](L: SomeLinkedRing[T]): SomeLinkedNode[T]
entries.description:
Iterates over every node of x. Removing the current node from the list during traversal is supported.

See also:

  • items iterator
  • mitems iterator

entries.code: proc `$`[T](L: SomeLinkedCollection[T]): string
entries.description: Turns a list into its string representation for logging and printing.

entries.name: find
entries.code: proc find[T](L: SomeLinkedCollection[T]; value: T): SomeLinkedNode[T]
entries.description:
Searches in the list for a value. Returns nil if the value does not exist.

See also:

  • contains proc

entries.name: contains
entries.code: proc contains[T](L: SomeLinkedCollection[T]; value: T): bool {.inline.}
entries.description:
Searches in the list for a value. Returns false if the value does not exist, true otherwise. This allows the usage of the in and notin operators.

See also:

  • find proc

entries.name: prepend
entries.code: proc prepend[T: SomeLinkedList](a: var T; b: T)
entries.description:
Prepends a shallow copy of b to the beginning of a.

See also:

  • prependMoved proc for moving the second list instead of copying

entries.name: prependMoved
entries.code: proc prependMoved[T: SomeLinkedList](a, b: var T)
entries.description:
Moves b before the head of a. Efficiency: O(1). Note that b becomes empty after the operation unless it has the same address as a. Self-prepending results in a cycle.

See also:

  • prepend proc for prepending a copy of a list

entries.name: add
entries.code: proc add[T](L: var SinglyLinkedList[T]; n: SinglyLinkedNode[T]) {.inline.}
entries.description:
Appends (adds to the end) a node n to L. Efficiency: O(1).

See also:

  • add proc for appending a value
  • prepend proc for prepending a node
  • prepend proc for prepending a value

entries.name: add
entries.code: proc add[T](L: var SinglyLinkedList[T]; value: T) {.inline.}
entries.description:
Appends (adds to the end) a value to L. Efficiency: O(1).

See also:

  • add proc for appending a value
  • prepend proc for prepending a node
  • prepend proc for prepending a value

entries.name: prepend
entries.code: proc prepend[T](L: var SinglyLinkedList[T]; n: SinglyLinkedNode[T]) {.inline.}
entries.description:
Prepends (adds to the beginning) a node to L. Efficiency: O(1).

See also:

  • add proc for appending a node
  • add proc for appending a value
  • prepend proc for prepending a value

entries.name: prepend
entries.code: proc prepend[T](L: var SinglyLinkedList[T]; value: T) {.inline.}
entries.description:
Prepends (adds to the beginning) a node to L. Efficiency: O(1).

See also:

  • add proc for appending a node
  • add proc for appending a value
  • prepend proc for prepending a node

entries.name: copy
entries.code: func copy[T](a: SinglyLinkedList[T]): SinglyLinkedList[T]
entries.description: Creates a shallow copy of a.

entries.name: addMoved
entries.code: proc addMoved[T](a, b: var SinglyLinkedList[T])
entries.description:
Moves b to the end of a. Efficiency: O(1). Note that b becomes empty after the operation unless it has the same address as a. Self-adding results in a cycle.

See also:

  • add proc for adding a copy of a list

entries.name: add
entries.code: proc add[T](L: var DoublyLinkedList[T]; n: DoublyLinkedNode[T])
entries.description:
Appends (adds to the end) a node n to L. Efficiency: O(1).

See also:

  • add proc for appending a value
  • prepend proc for prepending a node
  • prepend proc for prepending a value
  • remove proc for removing a node

entries.name: copy
entries.code: func copy[T](a: DoublyLinkedList[T]): DoublyLinkedList[T]
entries.description: Creates a shallow copy of a.

entries.name: addMoved
entries.code: proc addMoved[T](a, b: var DoublyLinkedList[T])
entries.description:
Moves b to the end of a. Efficiency: O(1). Note that b becomes empty after the operation unless it has the same address as a. Self-adding results in a cycle.

See also:

  • add proc for adding a copy of a list

entries.name: add
entries.code: proc add[T: SomeLinkedList](a: var T; b: T)
entries.description:
Appends a shallow copy of b to the end of a.

See also:

  • addMoved proc
  • addMoved proc for moving the second list instead of copying

entries.name: remove
entries.code:
proc remove[T](L: var SinglyLinkedList[T]; n: SinglyLinkedNode[T]): bool {.
    discardable.}
entries.description: Removes a node n from L. Returns true if n was found in L. Efficiency: O(n); the list is traversed until n is found. Attempting to remove an element not contained in the list is a no-op. When the list is cyclic, the cycle is preserved after removal.

entries.name: remove
entries.code: proc remove[T](L: var DoublyLinkedList[T]; n: DoublyLinkedNode[T])
entries.description: Removes a node n from L. Efficiency: O(1). This function assumes, for the sake of efficiency, that n is contained in L, otherwise the effects are undefined. When the list is cyclic, the cycle is preserved after removal.

entries.code: proc add[T](L: var SinglyLinkedRing[T]; n: SinglyLinkedNode[T])

entries.name: remove
entries.code: proc remove[T](L: var DoublyLinkedRing[T]; n: DoublyLinkedNode[T])
entries.description: Removes n from L. Efficiency: O(1). This function assumes, for the sake of efficiency, that n is contained in L, otherwise the effects are undefined.

entries.name: append
entries.code:
proc append[T](a: var (SinglyLinkedList[T] | SinglyLinkedRing[T]);
               b: SinglyLinkedList[T] | SinglyLinkedNode[T] | T)
entries.description:
Alias for a.add(b).

See also:

  • add proc
  • add proc
  • add proc

entries.name: append
entries.code:
proc append[T](a: var (DoublyLinkedList[T] | DoublyLinkedRing[T]);
               b: DoublyLinkedList[T] | DoublyLinkedNode[T] | T)

entries.name: appendMoved

entries.description:

entries.name: toSinglyLinkedList
entries.code: func toSinglyLinkedList[T](elems: openArray[T]): SinglyLinkedList[T]
entries.description: Creates a new SinglyLinkedList from the members of elems.

entries.code: func toSinglyLinkedRing[T](elems: openArray[T]): SinglyLinkedRing[T]
